items.title: Tracking Jeremy Grantham's GMO Capital Portfolio - Q3 2025 Update
items.description: GMO's Q3 2025 13F portfolio rose to $35.46B, with Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta, Apple, and Lam Research as top holdings. Learn more about the portfolio here.

items.title: Final Trade: UNH, DELL, CEG, MOH
items.description: The final trades of the day with CNBC's Melissa Lee and the 'Fast Money' traders.

items.title: Health insurance weakness is a major opportunity for investors, says Bernstein's Lance Wilkes
items.description: Lance Wilkes, Bernstein Research managing director & senior research analyst, joins 'Fast Money' to talk worries around health care premiums jumping and how that is impacting health care companies.

items.title: Dow down 435 points on losses in shares of Home Depot, Amazon.com Inc.
items.description: Dow down 435 points on losses in shares of Home Depot, Amazon.com Inc.

items.title: Integrated Solutions Appoints Greg Arms to Board of Directors
items.description: Integrated Solutions for Benefits and Insurance Services (IS Benefits), a provider of stop-loss underwriting, specialty drug management, and claims auditing for self-funded employers, and a portfolio company of Argosy Healthcare Partners (AHP), today announced the appointment of Greg Arms as a member of the Company's Board of Directors.
